article_meta.title: | Updated November 25, 2025 9:00am EST Nearly 1 in 4 American households

reasoning: The model used non-approved bias types, included quoted/attributed language as author bias in multiple items, and outputted code-fenced JSON (structurally invalid). Its flagged instances are largely not genuine author-prose bias.

custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: The article’s author prose is largely neutral; no major missed bias instances.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed categories (Framing Bias, Selection Bias, Emphasis Bias) instead of the specified types.
